title: REUSED CONTENT! Monetization disabled! What now?
excerpt: Explains what reused content means for YouTube monetization and what creators can do after monetization has been disabled.
contentHtml:
Transkript

what is reused content and how do I appeal reused  content when YouTube Flags you for reused content   they are not sure if you are the actual owner of  the content of your Channel or they are uncertain   that you the Creator gave input to the content  that is being uploaded common examples of what   counts as reused content are unedited gameplay  without commentary reactions if YouTube determines   that the reaction itself doesn't add any value to  the video itself to the original content stream   highlights even if you are

edited them and the  streamer has given you permission to upload them   however you can upload your own stream highlights  on a second Channel just make sure to open that   channel from the same email as the original  content content that you don't have the rights   to for example Clips or of a TV show or movie and  as the most recent examples AI content that can   either be a video um an AI video an AI slideshow  voiceovers text to speech or combination of all   of them to make

sure you don't get flagged a  second time for reused content when appealing   the decision make sure you delete not unlist  or make private all the content that could fit   into some of the uh examples I've listed before  however this will also remove the uh watch time   and views from the respective content that you've  deleted and could make you drop below the YouTube   Partner program requirements keep in mind that  a rejected appeal will also lead to a 90-day   penalty before you you can reapply if you have

any  further questions on reused content make sure to   drop them in the comments below and subscribe to  this channel for more information about YouTube
